On November 13, 2025, Liberty Media Corporation announced a change in the start time for its annual Investor Meeting scheduled for November 20, 2025. data.title: Plains All American Completes $750M Debt Offering
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Plains All American ( (PAA) ) has shared an announcement.

On November 14, 2025, Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. and PAA Finance Corp. completed a public offering of $750 million in debt securities, comprising $300 million of 4.700% Senior Notes due 2031 and $450 million of 5.600% Senior Notes due 2036. These notes are additional issuances to those initially issued on September 8, 2025, and will mature in 2031 and 2036, respectively. The offering aims to strengthen PAA’s financial position by increasing the total outstanding principal amount of these notes to $1 billion each. The notes are senior unsecured obligations, ranking equally with existing senior debt and are subject to certain covenants and events of default as outlined in the indenture agreements.

The most recent analyst rating on (PAA) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Plains All American stock, see the PAA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PAA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PAA is a Outperform.

Plains All American’s overall stock score is driven by its strong financial performance and attractive valuation, which are offset by mixed technical indicators and temporary financial challenges highlighted in the earnings call. The company’s strategic acquisitions and divestitures are expected to enhance long-term stability, but short-term leverage concerns and market challenges need to be monitored.

To see Spark’s full report on PAA stock, click here.

More about Plains All American

Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. operates in the energy industry, focusing on the transportation, storage, and marketing of crude oil and refined products. The company is a key player in the midstream sector, providing essential infrastructure and logistics services to support the energy supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 2,882,755

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $11.65B

Learn more about PAA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Draganfly ( (TSE:DPRO) ) is now available.

On November 13, 2025, Draganfly Inc. announced a second major order from a Fortune 50 telecommunications company to expand its NDAA-compliant heavy lift drone fleet. This order involves the delivery of multiple Commander 3XL drones integrated with Unmanned Systems & Solutions Inc.’s LEAP® tether system, enhancing the customer’s emergency management and post-disaster telecommunication support capabilities. This collaboration highlights Draganfly’s commitment to integrating specialized technologies for improved mission performance, reinforcing its position in the public safety and infrastructure sectors.

data.description:

Renasant ( (RNST) ) has shared an announcement.

On November 10, 2025, Dr. Richard Heyer informed Renasant Corporation that he will not seek re-election as a director at the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for April 28, 2026. Dr. Heyer will also retire from the board of Renasant Bank, a subsidiary of the company. His decision was not due to any disagreements with the company’s operations, policies, or practices.

Prime Meridian Resources ( (TSE:BEM) ) has issued an announcement.

Brasnova Energy Materials Inc. has acquired phosphate exploration concessions in Piaui, Brazil, covering 10,198 hectares. The Piaui Verde Phosphate Project aims to explore phosphate mineralization with potential for critical metals like copper and nickel. This project aligns with the U.S. adding phosphate to its Critical Minerals List, enhancing Brasnova’s strategic positioning in the fertilizer and battery sectors.

Brasnova Energy Materials Inc. is focused on securing, developing, and monetizing energy materials assets and technologies to build shareholder value.

data.title: SMX Initiates Reverse Stock Split to Optimize Share Structure
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

SMX Public Limited Company ( (SMX) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 18, 2025, SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company will implement a reverse stock split, consolidating every eight ordinary shares into one. This move, approved by the Board of Directors, reduces the number of outstanding shares from 8,404,581 to 1,050,572 and adjusts all related securities proportionately. The reverse stock split aims to enhance the company’s stock market positioning and streamline its share structure, impacting shareholders by aggregating fractional shares for market sale.

More about SMX Public Limited Company

SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company operates in the technology sector, providing marking, tracking, measuring, and digital platform technology solutions. The company focuses on helping businesses transition to a low-carbon economy by addressing challenges related to carbon neutrality and compliance with governmental and regional regulations.

Average Trading Volume: 2,004,614

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.36M
